meaning: n.一种北极鹅,藤壶,难以摆脱的人(或物)
examples: Surprisingly, in areas where tidal currents are very weak, juvenile horseshoe crabs are found not to have significant barnacle populations, even though they seldom burrow.
The barnacle and the clam are two examples of filter feeders.
I'm Barnacle Bill. I sank with the Titanic. I rose in salty heaven.
He can show off his muscular claws and craggy barnacle encrusted shell to the world.
Over time the economy will be weighed down by all these costs, like a barnacle-encrusted ship.
